resources.title: React Architecture Patterns
resources.description: A comprehensive guide to scaling React applications using custom hooks and modular component structures. Discusses context providers, custom hooks, and state abstraction.

resources.title: Mastering the Fetch API
resources.description: How to build robust networking layers in JavaScript without heavy third-party libraries. Includes error handling, timeouts, and request cancellation strategies.

resources.title: Minimal UI Design Guidelines
resources.description: Learn the principles of minimalist interface design. Focuses on typography, white space, and subtle interactions over flashy animations and glassmorphism.
